reviewedExceptions.content: Variables hubadilishwa kwenye URLs, headers na body kwa {{baseUrl}} , {{token}} , provider secrets na API keys za Afrika. Ukihifadhi variables, zinabaki kwenye browser hii tu. Usihifadhi production secrets kwenye kifaa cha pamoja.
reviewedExceptions.message: An unresolved template expression appears in visible page content.
reviewedExceptions.exceptionReason: The API tester intentionally teaches its user-entered variable syntax in visible help copy.

reviewedExceptions.content: Variables are replaced in URLs, headers and bodies with {{baseUrl}} , {{token}} , provider secrets, and African API keys. Saving variables stores them in this browser only. Do not save production secrets on shared machines.
